overview: Vessel Men's Health is a men's health optimization clinic with locations in Boise and Meridian, Idaho, specializing in testosterone optimization, medical weight loss, peptide therapy, and regenerative medicine. The clinic uses an onsite CLIA/COLA certified lab and DEXA scanning to provide same-day diagnostics and treatment initiation through their 'Know Your Numbers' protocol.
highlights: Onsite CLIA/COLA certified lab with same-day results
DEXA body composition scanning integrated into treatment protocols
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone optimization, medical weight loss, and comprehensive health optimization.
